title: GPT 5.6 is out… but not for you lol
summary: David Ondrej comments that GPT 5.6 has been released but is not widely available to general users. The video title uses a dismissive tone to highlight the limited access to the latest model version.
writeup: David Ondrej notes that GPT 5.6 has been released but is not broadly available to general users. The point is access: the latest model version exists, yet rollout remains limited rather than open to everyone. The title's dismissive framing underscores that gap between announcement and availability.
